_meta.source: UPS 2026 Rate and Service Guide — Revised Rates for Value-Added Services and Other Charges
notes: All rates are LIST (published) rates. Apply shipper contract discount before using.
Fuel surcharge is NOT here — it is a weekly variable rate in ups-fuel-surcharge-history.json.
Zone-tiered charges use base zone (2–8). Air encoded zones (102, 202, 302…) resolve to base = zone % 100.
Territory zones (44=AK, 45=HI/PR, 46=other) are treated as zone 8 for tiered lookups.

residentialSurcharge._note: Applied when residential=true. Use ground rate for UPS Ground; air rate for all air services.

addressCorrection._note: Post-shipment charge; include in estimate when flag is set.

deliveryAreaSurcharge._note: Applied when destination ZIP is in a DAS zone (see das-zips.json). Key = dasType + commercial/residential + ground/air.

largePackageSurcharge._note: Applied when package exceeds UPS Large Package thresholds (length > 96 in OR length+girth > 130 in). Zone-tiered by base zone.

additionalHandling._note: Only the highest-triggering subtype is charged per package (weight > dimensions > packaging). Zone-tiered by base zone.

remoteAreaSurcharge._note: Applied when destination ZIP is a remote area (see remote-zips.json). Key = remote type from that file.

declaredValue._note: Applied when declaredValueDollars > 0. Charge = max(minimum, declaredValueDollars / 100 * ratePerHundred).

saturdayDelivery._note: TODO — rate not present in accessorial sheet. Sourced separately from UPS Rate and Service Guide per-service section.

smallBusiness._note: UPS Small Business program rates (2026, eff. 2026-01-26). Source: small-business-rate-guide-us-en.pdf. Waived: fuel surcharge, DAS (domestic), Remote Area US-48, Additional Handling, Large Package Surcharge, Address Correction. Contract discounts not applicable.
